target_protocol: existing binary targets: minority=1 majority=0; multiclass benchmark sources: dataset-specific minority-vs-rest before CV
ir_protocol: IR computed after final target construction; no expected-IR forcing
preprocessing: MinMaxScaler and OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown='ignore') fitted only on each training fold
oversampling: applied only to preprocessed training fold
deep_tabular_baselines: CTGAN and TVAE restricted to Features > 30 and excluded from statistics/CD analyses
